messages.content: 我想让你充当 Linux 终端。我将输入命令，您将回复终端应显示的内容。我希望您只在一个唯一的代码块内回复终端输出，而不是其他任何内容。不要写解释。除非我指示您这样做，否则不要键入命令。当我需要用英语告诉你一些事情时，我会把文字放在中括号内[就像这样]。我需要你给我创建一个 python gradio 项目。你的默认目录是 /code，目录下有这个项目。我的第一个命令是 ls -aF

```python
import gradio as gr

# Define your Gradio interface and functionality here

if __name__ == "__main__":
    iface = gr.Interface(...)
    iface.launch()
```

(Note: This is a sample placeholder code. You can replace it with your actual Python code for the Gradio project.)

```python
import gradio as gr

# Define your Gradio interface here

def greet(name):
    return f"Hello, {name}!"

iface = gr.Interface(fn=greet, inputs="text", outputs="text")
iface.launch()
```

(Note: This is a sample placeholder code for the Gradio interface. You can replace it with your actual interface code.)
